# awscc_elementalinference_feed (Resource)

Represents a feed that receives media for inference processing



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `outputs` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--outputs))

### Optional

- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String)
- `data_endpoints` (List of String)
- `feed_id` (String)
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--outputs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `outputs`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `output_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--outputs--output_config))
- `status` (String)

Optional:

- `description` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--outputs--output_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `outputs.output_config`

Optional:

- `clipping` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--outputs--output_config--clipping))
- `cropping` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--outputs--output_config--clipping"></a>
### Nested Schema for `outputs.output_config.clipping`

Optional:

- `callback_metadata` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_elementalinference_feed.example
  identity = {
    id = "id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `id` (String)

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_elementalinference_feed.example
  id = "id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_elementalinference_feed.example "id"
```
